title: tulipa celsiana var. fragrans
intro: Tulipa celsiana var. fragrans, also known as the fragrant celsian tulip or sweet tulip, is a variety of the wild tulip that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tulipa celsiana var. fragrans include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. It can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to release its fragrant scent and promote relaxation.
